name: code-review-3task
description: Explorer maps codebase, reviewer audits, reporter summarizes findings

tasks.prompt: Explore the codebase and produce a context document listing all key files, exported functions, types, and import paths. Write the output to context.md in the working directory.
tasks.name: Explorer

tasks.prompt: Review the codebase using the context document provided. Identify code quality issues, potential bugs, security concerns, and architecture improvements. Write findings to review-findings.json as a JSON array of objects with fields: severity (critical/warning/info), file, line, message.
tasks.name: Reviewer

tasks.prompt: Read the review findings JSON and produce a human-readable markdown report summarizing all issues grouped by severity. Write the report to review-report.md.
tasks.name: Reporter
tasks.scope: Summarize review findings into a report
